title: You've Been Buying the Extract. The Evidence Says Eat the Food.
description: A $50 billion supplement industry has convinced us that probiotic capsules deliver the benefits of fermented foods in a cleaner, more convenient form. A Stanford RCT and 19 prospective cohorts suggest that's exactly backwards — and the mechanism explains why no pill can replicate what kimchi, kefir, and yogurt actually do to your cardiovascular system.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for You've Been Buying the Extract. The Evidence Says Eat the Food.
